  }

  //femaleName

    return getRandom(female);
  } 

  //BeautyBrand

    return getRandom(beautyBrandList);
  } 

  //BankingBrand
  else if (p1 === "Banking") {
    return getRandom(financeBrandList);
  } 

  //FashionBrand

    return getRandom(fashionBrandList);
  } 

  //F&BBrand

    return getRandom(foodBrandList);
  } 

  
  else if (p1 === "StoreName") {
    return getRandom(storeBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "HealthcareBuilding") {
    return getRandom(healthcareBrandList);
  } 

      
  else if (p1 === "RealEstateCorp") {
    return getRandom(realEstateBrandList);
  } 

      
  else if (p1 === "TechnologyCompany") {
    return getRandom(technologyBrandList);
  } 

      
  else if (p1 === "Travel&TourismAgency") {
    return getRandom(travelBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "schoolName") {
    return getRandom(educationBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "EntertainmentProfile") {
    return getRandom(entertainmentBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "MarketingAgency") {
    return getRandom(marketingBrandList);
  } 

    
  else {
    return match; 
  }

return {
  json: {
    replace_Placeholder: updatedText
  }
};

  //MaleName
  if (p1 === "maleName") {
    return getRandom(male);
  }

  //femaleName
  else if (p1 === "femaleName") {
    return getRandom(female);
  } 

  //BeautyBrand

    return getRandom(beautyBrandList);
  } 

  //BankingBrand
  else if (p1 === "Banking") {
    return getRandom(financeBrandList);
  } 

  //FashionBrand
  else if (p1 === "FashionBrand") {
    return getRandom(fashionBrandList);
  } 

  //F&BBrand
  else if (p1 === "F&BBrand") {
    return getRandom(foodBrandList);
  } 

  
  else if (p1 === "StoreName") {
    return getRandom(storeBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "HealthcareBuilding") {
    return getRandom(healthcareBrandList);
  } 

      
  else if (p1 === "RealEstateCorp") {
    return getRandom(realEstateBrandList);
  } 

      
  else if (p1 === "TechnologyCompany") {
    return getRandom(technologyBrandList);
  } 

      
  else if (p1 === "Travel&TourismAgency") {
    return getRandom(travelBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "schoolName") {
    return getRandom(educationBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "EntertainmentProfile") {
    return getRandom(entertainmentBrandList);
  } 

    
  else if (p1 === "MarketingAgency") {
    return getRandom(marketingBrandList);
  } 

    
  else {
    return match; 
  }
});

// Kembalikan hasil ke workflow n8n
return {
  json: {
    replace_Placeholder: updatedText
  }
};
